message:
✨ Add demo data banner for dashboards

- Show banner when any cards are displaying demo/mock data
- Display count of cards using demo data
- Banner can be dismissed with X button
- References dashed yellow border indicator on demo cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
